title: Suspended sediment dynamics in Himalayan rivers using sensor-based and citizen-science monitoring
abstract: Study presenting suspended-sediment dynamics from a multi-site Himalayan monitoring campaign with sensor and community-based data streams.

title: Strengths and limitations of citizen science rainfall monitoring in Nepal
abstract: Evaluation of the reliability and practical use of citizen-science rainfall observations compared with standard monitoring and CHIRPS products in Nepal.

title: Short-term sediment dynamics from Himalayan catchments: AGU conference contribution
abstract: Conference contribution highlighting event-scale suspended sediment dynamics and implications for mountain water systems.
